action.reasoning: Observation: Best result was iter 4 with safe_follow_steps=48.58 using ang=-K*angle. Iter 5 changed to ang=K*angle and regressed to 1.48. Iter 6 had truncated predict.py causing eval failure. Iters 7-8 had JSON parse errors. Analysis: The angular sign is definitively -1 (ang=-K*angle). The predict.py was truncated in iter 6 causing eval failure. I need a complete, working predict.py. Decision: Write complete predict.py with ang=-K*angle, improved heuristic (face-first navigation, better safe zone maintenance), save checkpoint, run quick syntax test, and submit eval.
action.command: python train.py && python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('predict.py', doraise=True); print('predict.py syntax OK')"
